Title: Verify Configuration settings
Test Data: Valid values for MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key
Test Steps:
1. Access the Configuration module
2. Verify that the attributes MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key are present
3. Set the values for MIN_AGE, MIN_PASSWORD, and API_key to valid values
4. Save the configuration settings

Title: Verify NotificationSystem functionalities
Test Steps:
1. Access the NotificationSystem module
2. Verify that the operations start(), downloadReport(), showNotification(), and sendNotification() are present
3. Call the start() operation
4. Call the downloadReport() operation with a valid access token
5. Call the showNotification() operation
6. Call the sendNotification() operation with a valid access token

Title: Verify Server functionalities
Test Data: Valid signup, login, logout, usernameExists, renameUserName, profile_weight, profile_height, profile_date, profile_city, get_access_token, and reset values
Test Steps:
1. Access the Server module
2. Verify that the operations signup(), login(), logout(), usernameExists(), renameUserName(), profile_weight(), profile_height(), profile_date(), profile_city(), get_access_token(), and reset() are present
3. Call the signup() operation with valid data
4. Call the login() operation with valid data
5. Call the logout() operation
6. Call the usernameExists() operation with a valid username
7. Call the renameUserName() operation with a valid username and new name
8. Call the profile_weight(), profile_height(), profile_date(), profile_city(), get_access_token(), and reset() operations with valid data

Title: Verify Service functionalities
Test Data: Valid oldDate, newDate, creatorID, getReport, getCategory, getIcon, getAddress, getLatitude, getLongitude, get_access_token
Test Steps:
1. Access the Service module
2. Verify that the operations oldDate(), newDate(), creatorID(), getReport(), getCategory(), getIcon(), getAddress(), getLatitude(), getLongitude(), get_access_token() are present
3. Call the oldDate(), newDate(), creatorID(), getReport(), getCategory(), getIcon(), getAddress(), getLatitude(), getLongitude(), and get_access_token() operations with valid data

Title: Verify Report data
Test Data: Valid createDate, title, priority, category, address, and creator
Test Steps:
1. Access the Report module
2. Verify that the operations createDate(), title(), priority(), category(), address(), and creator() are present
3. Call the createDate(), title(), priority(), category(), address(), and creator() operations with valid data
Expected Result: All operations are executed successfully and return the expected values

Title: Verify successful login
Test Steps:
1. Access the Login module
2. Enter a valid email and password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in

Title: Verify unsuccessful login (invalid email)
Test Steps:
1. Access the Login module
2. Enter an invalid email and valid password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: The login fails and an error message is displayed

Title: Verify unsuccessful login (invalid password)
Test Steps:
1. Access the Login module
2. Enter a valid email and an invalid password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: The login fails and an error message is displayed

Title: Verify unsuccessful login (blank email)
Test Steps:
1. Access the Login module
2. Enter a blank email and valid password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: The login fails and an error message is displayed

Title: Verify unsuccessful login (blank password)
Test Steps:
1. Access the Login module
2. Enter a valid email and a blank password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: The login fails and an error message is displayed
